A

Returns the underlying Brigadier argument type.

B

BrigadierArgumentRegistry() - Constructor for class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.commands.brigadier.BrigadierCommandRegistry.BrigadierArgumentRegistry
Creates a new Brigadier argument registry with default resolvers.
BrigadierCommandRegistry<S> - Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.commands.brigadier
Shared Brigadier-backed command registry logic.
BrigadierCommandRegistry(String, String, LoggerCore, CommandPlatform<S>, Consumer<TypeParserRegistry<S>>, BrigadierCommandRegistry.AudienceFactory<S>, BiConsumer<S, Runnable>, TaskScheduler) - Constructor for class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.commands.brigadier.BrigadierCommandRegistry
Creates a Brigadier-backed command registry.
BrigadierCommandRegistry(String, String, LoggerCore, CommandPlatform<S>, Consumer<TypeParserRegistry<S>>, BrigadierCommandRegistry.AudienceFactory<S>, BiConsumer<S, Runnable>, TaskScheduler, Consumer<BrigadierCommandRegistry.BrigadierArgumentRegistry<S>>) - Constructor for class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.commands.brigadier.BrigadierCommandRegistry
Creates a Brigadier-backed command registry with optional Brigadier argument resolvers.
BrigadierCommandRegistry.AudienceFactory<S> - Interface in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.commands.brigadier
Factory for wrapping a command source into an audience.
BrigadierCommandRegistry.BrigadierArgumentRegistry<S> - Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.commands.brigadier
Registry for Brigadier argument resolvers.
BrigadierCommandRegistry.BrigadierArgumentResolver<S> - Interface in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.commands.brigadier
Resolves Brigadier argument shape for a command argument.
BrigadierCommandRegistry.BrigadierArgumentShape - Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.commands.brigadier
Brigadier-side shape for a single command argument.

commandManager() - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.commands.brigadier.BrigadierCommandRegistry
Returns the command manager.

I

initialized() - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.commands.brigadier.BrigadierCommandRegistry
Returns whether the registry has been initialized.

L

literalAlternatives() - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.commands.brigadier.BrigadierCommandRegistry.BrigadierArgumentShape
Returns the list of literal alternatives for this argument.

N

nativeSuggestions(ArgumentType<?>) - Static method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.commands.brigadier.BrigadierCommandRegistry.BrigadierArgumentShape
Creates a shape that uses native Brigadier suggestions for this argument.

O

of(ArgumentType<?>) - Static method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.commands.brigadier.BrigadierCommandRegistry.BrigadierArgumentShape
Creates a shape from a standard Brigadier argument type.

P

priority() - Method in interface dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.commands.brigadier.BrigadierCommandRegistry.BrigadierArgumentResolver
Higher priority resolvers run first.

R

register(BrigadierCommandRegistry.BrigadierArgumentResolver<S>) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.commands.brigadier.BrigadierCommandRegistry.BrigadierArgumentRegistry
Registers a custom argument resolver.
registerAllCommands(CommandDispatcher<S>, MagicCommand...) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.commands.brigadier.BrigadierCommandRegistry
Registers all provided commands.
registerAllSpecs(CommandDispatcher<S>, CommandSpec<?>...) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.commands.brigadier.BrigadierCommandRegistry
Registers all provided command specs.
registerCommand(CommandDispatcher<S>, MagicCommand) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.commands.brigadier.BrigadierCommandRegistry
Registers a single MagicUtils command.
registerSpec(CommandDispatcher<S>, CommandSpec<?>) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.commands.brigadier.BrigadierCommandRegistry
Registers a compatibility command spec by converting it to a MagicCommand.
resolve(CommandArgument) - Method in interface dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.commands.brigadier.BrigadierCommandRegistry.BrigadierArgumentResolver
Returns a Brigadier shape for the argument or null when unsupported.
resolve(CommandArgument) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.commands.brigadier.BrigadierCommandRegistry.BrigadierArgumentRegistry
Resolves a Brigadier shape for a command argument.
runOnMain(S, Runnable) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.commands.brigadier.BrigadierCommandRegistry
Runs a task on the main thread when an executor is provided.

U

useNativeSuggestions() - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.commands.brigadier.BrigadierCommandRegistry.BrigadierArgumentShape
Returns whether to use native suggestions.

W

Returns a new shape with an added literal alternative.

Returns a new shape with added literal alternatives.

Returns a new shape with added literal alternatives.
